summary: P23 Hierarchy Management - Frontend Testing Complete. All 12 features tested and verified. The hierarchy management page renders correctly at /hierarchy/manage with all required components: sidebar nav item with GitBranch icon, hierarchy list with tab filters, child rows with type badges and push buttons, create dialog with type selector, push wizard (preview/confirm/results), diagnostics section, and collapsible push history with pagination.
critical_code_review_comments: HierarchyManagement.jsx correctly implements all P23 requirements
useHierarchyManagement.js hook properly handles API calls and state management
api.js getHierarchyList, getPushForm, pushBundle, getHierarchyHistory functions work correctly
screenVisibility.js correctly hides scr-hierarchy-manage for franchise actors
Sidebar.jsx correctly shows GitBranch icon for Store Management nav item
Push wizard 3-step flow (preview → confirm → results) works correctly
Diagnostics section shows link repairs after push
Nested franchises display with indent indicator (└) for master actor
All data-testid attributes are properly implemented for testing
seed_data_creation: None - using real POS API via proxy. Test stores exist: TestCentral_P23_Probe (787), TestFranchise_P23_Probe (788), TestFranchise_P23_Central (789).
context_for_next_testing_agent: P23 Hierarchy Management fully tested. All features working: sidebar nav item (data-testid='nav-hierarchy-manage'), page rendering (data-testid='hierarchy-management'), tab filters (All/Master Stores/Outlets), child rows with type badges and push buttons, create dialog with type selector (Master Store/Outlet options), push wizard 3-step flow, diagnostics section with link repairs, collapsible push history with pagination. Master actor can see nested franchises with indent indicators. Push to TestCentral_P23_Probe executed successfully (0 inserted, 33 updated, 0 failed).

features_tested.TEST-1: PASS - Login with master credentials and sidebar shows 'Store Management' nav item with GitBranch icon (data-testid='nav-hierarchy-manage')
features_tested.TEST-2: PASS - Navigate to /hierarchy/manage - page loads with hierarchy list (data-testid='hierarchy-management', 'hierarchy-list')
features_tested.TEST-3: PASS - Tab filters work: 'All (4)' shows all children, 'Master Stores (3)' shows centrals, 'Outlets (7)' shows franchises including nested
features_tested.TEST-4: PASS - Each child row shows: Name, Type badge (Master/Outlet), Email, Created date, Push button (data-testid='push-btn-{id}')
features_tested.TEST-5: PASS - Click 'Create Store' button - create dialog opens (data-testid='create-child-dialog') with type selector and form fields
features_tested.TEST-6: PASS - In create dialog, child_type selector shows both 'Master Store' and 'Outlet' options for master actor
features_tested.TEST-7: PASS - Click 'Push' button on child row - push wizard opens (data-testid='push-wizard-dialog') with preview of source entities (categories:2, foods:3, addons:1, ingredients:4, sub_recipes:0, recipes:3)
features_tested.TEST-8: PASS - In push wizard, click 'Push Now' - confirmation step shows warning message (data-testid='push-confirm')
features_tested.TEST-9: PASS - In push wizard confirmation, click 'Confirm Push' - push executes and results show per-module inserted/updated/failed counts (data-testid='push-results')
features_tested.TEST-10: PASS - Push results show diagnostics section with link repairs (fixed recipe addon id, fixed addon recipe id, fixed inventory category id, fixed food recipe id)
features_tested.TEST-11: PASS - Push History section exists (data-testid='push-history-section'), collapsible (collapsed by default), expands to show 158 history logs with pagination
features_tested.TEST-12: PASS - Nested franchise outlets appear in the list for master actor with indent indicator (└): DemoFranchise1-4, TestFranchise_P23_Central
